playbook.intent: New agent builder → CI-runnable eval harness with golden trajectories, behavioral evals, judge rubrics, drift signal in week 1.
playbook.scope: New agent builder has a CI-runnable eval harness with golden trajectories, behavioral evals, judge rubrics, and a drift signal that fires before users see regressions. Bootstrap shape, not deep.

success-criteria.criterion: Drift signal firing on a known regression

stage.name: Golden Set
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when ≥10 reliable trajectories exist.

stage.name: Behaviorals
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when judges score on the golden set.

stage.name: CI Gate
stage.intent: Wire CI to fail on regression.
stage.decision-gate: Ship only when a known-bad PR is blocked.

extra.value: [Long-term eval-set authoring — covered by playbook 1, Productizing the harness]
[A working agent loop, CI runner available]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content production-agent-eval-harness-week-1 --format md, agent: faion get-content production-agent-eval-harness-week-1 --format context, json: faion get-content production-agent-eval-harness-week-1 --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
